user.title: Inkbird INT
user.description: Add an Inkbird INT food thermometer. INT-14 is tested; other model profiles are experimental or cataloged. BLE is local. Tuya LAN is local and requires host, device ID and local key supplied by you. Cloud history is configured later from options and is experimental read-only.

data.name: Device name
data.lan_test_on_setup: Test Tuya LAN connection before saving

error.lan_incomplete: To test Tuya LAN, host, device ID and local key are required.
error.lan_connect_failed: Tuya LAN test failed. Check host, device ID, local key, protocol version and network reachability.

abort.already_configured: This Inkbird INT-14 is already configured.

init.title: Inkbird INT options
init.description: INT-14 is tested; other model profiles are experimental or cataloged. Cloud history is read-only and disabled by default. It does not support live cloud updates or cloud writes.

data.lan_test_on_setup: Test Tuya LAN connection before saving

error.lan_incomplete: To test Tuya LAN, host, device ID and local key are required.
error.lan_connect_failed: Tuya LAN test failed. Check host, device ID, local key, protocol version and network reachability.
